For urgent needs call us at Home Our Team Infection Control Procedures Cosmetic Dentistry Assess Your Smile Teeth Whitening Veeners Cosmetic Fillings Tooth Jewelery & Tooth Tattoos Orthodontics (Braces) Kid's Dentistry Endodontics (Root Canal Treatment) Replacement Of Missing Tooth Implants Fixed Bridges Dentures Gum Treatment Geriatric Dentistry Oral Surgery (Impaction) FAQ's Request Appointments Testimonials Contact Us Dr. Chitrang Thaker Dr. Gunjan Mehta Thaker Clinic Timings: Mon - Sat: (Morning) 9am - 1pm Mon - Sat: (Evening) 5pm - 9pm Sunday Closed About Our Clinic At THE DENTAL STUDIO we believe that Oral cavity is the primary gateway to good health and over all well being. With this fundamental concept our practice is committed to long term dental health. Our goal is to deliver exceptional results in all areas of dentistry maintaining world class standards in a comfortable patient friendly environment. At THE DENTAL STUDIO along with our associate staff, complete care is taken to understand your need and design a treatment plan, creating smiles and building relations for a lifetime. Read more Interesting Links Dentistry - Wikipedia Dentistry is a branch of medicine that is involved in the study, diagnosis, prevention, and treatment of diseases, disorders and conditions of the oral cavity.
